name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Programming Environment Started with a Privileged Account
notes: This Building Block triggers when a programming environment has been started with a privileged account.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Programming Environment Started with a Privileged Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(cmd|powershell|rundll32|scrcons|(w|c)script|(ba)?sh)\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER(Username) MATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Programming Environment Started with a Privileged Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '(cmd|powershell|rundll32|scrcons|(w|c)script|(ba)?sh)\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER(Username) MATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
